posts.author: cgoloe (CG)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I created a custom app and install it in a board.
The app creates items.
then i shared the board with users and made them collaborates.
But, when one board app created new item it duplicated and created x items(x is the number of users that shared the board).
How can i install the app in another user independently?
Yhanks!
